64 Grand Army of the Republic Hwy, Iowa City, IA 52246, USA

3-4 fruiting apple trees along the walk path. Just look for the falling crabapples to know when it's time to pick. Seem to mostly wormy, but a few good ones available. Falling Fruit season: September-October.

2425 Prairie Meadow Dr, Iowa City, IA 52246, USA

Multiple American plum trees right off the road by the parking lot, easily reached. A few trees have smaller (cherry-sized) plums, while others have larger (small apricot-sized) plums. Falling Fruit season: August-unknown.
